arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle United fixture altered as Premier League issue statement
arts.sum: A Premier League statement included information about the change: "The fixture has a new kick off time of 8.15pm with the reason for the amendment live coverage on TNT Sports." United's website read: "Tickets for Newcastle United's Premier League game at Manchester City are now sold out.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United set huge Lloyd Kelly price tag to dash Jose Mourinho transfer hopes
arts.sum: Newcastle United look set to keep Fenerbahce target Lloyd Kelly after sticking a hefty price tag on the experienced centre-back this month. Howe rates the player after working with him at both aforementioned clubs and Kelly himself has expressed no desire to seek a move elsewhere despite limited game time at St James' Park thus far.

arts.ttl: Newcastle predicted lineup vs Bournemouth - Premier League
arts.sum: How Newcastle could line up for their Premier League clash with Bournemouth on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Player’s performances at Bournemouth ‘put him on the agenda’ – Iraola relationship may be key
arts.sum: Kepa Arrizabalaga’s performances on loan at Bournemouth from Chelsea this season have lined up suitors for the summer. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who say Kepa’s performances for Bournemouth have ‘put him on the agenda’ for numerous clubs. arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak to Arsenal? Newcastle INCREASE huge asking price
arts.sum: Arsenal have suffered a major blow in their pursuit of Alexander Isak, with Newcastle United reportedly increasing their asking price amid his immense recent form. Isak is under consideration too, but a move is unlikely to happen in 2025, with Newcastle set to demand a world record transfer fee for the Sweden star.

arts.ttl: What happened to Marc Guehi 'transfer pot' amid sobering £12m Newcastle United PSR truth
arts.sum: Newcastle United do not want to lose any players this month but Eddie Howe has admitted that the Magpies have to take the'short-term pain' as Atlanta United close in on Miguel Almiron Trading is going to be a key part of Newcastle's transfer strategy moving forward after the Magpies narrowly avoided a PSR breach following the 11th-hour sales of Elliot Anderson and Yankuba Minteh last summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United sent clear Lloyd Kelly transfer message after Jose Mourinho bid
arts.sum: Kelly gets some much needed game time and continental experience, and Fenerbahce contribute a percentage of his wages... Newcastle's position is that they don't have to sell the summer signing in the January transfer window, and that Fenerbahce's offer falls short of their valuation .
